/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -mavx2 -include immintrin.h -O3 -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libllava_shared.so -o libllava_shared.so CMakeFiles/llava.dir/llava.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llava.dir/clip.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/srbank/code/BitNet/build_gcc_avx/3rdparty/llama.cpp/src:/home/srbank/code/BitNet/build_gcc_avx/3rdparty/llama.cpp/ggml/src: ../../src/libllama.so -pthread ../../ggml/src/libggml.so
